mermaidSyntax:
graph TD A[PI Writes Grant Application
R01 or R21] --> B[Institution Grants Office
Compliance Checks] B --> C[NIH Center for Scientific Review
Receives Application] C --> D[Assign to Study Section] C --> E[Program Officer Assigned
NIMH, NCI, etc.] D --> F[Study Section Review
External Scientists] E -.-> F F --> G[Scoring: 1-9 Scale
Significance • Innovation • Approach
Investigators • Environment] G --> H[Study Section Meeting
Top 50% Discussed
Primary/Secondary/Tertiary Reviewers] H --> I[Percentile Scores Calculated] I --> J{Advisory Council
Funding Decision} J -->|Funded| K[Grants Management Specialist
Budget Negotiation] J -->|Not Funded| L[PI May Revise &
Resubmit Once] L --> B K --> M[Award Made
~9 Months Total] style J fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style K fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff style L fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style M fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff

failures.description: Decision outcomes (accept/reject/revise) not shown in alt/opt blocks
failures.suggestedFix: Use alt blocks to show editor decision outcomes
